# Specification & Development Plan

This folder contains specifications, audit reports, and development plans for the Ollama MCP Server.

## Files

- **code-audit.md** — Results from code quality audits, stub/incomplete code checks
- **development-plan.md** — Roadmap and plans for ongoing development

## Purpose

These specs are used by AI agents and contributors to understand what work has been done,
what issues were found, and what the priorities are for future development.
